description: Style NoteTaking the bright colours of summer and nature, vero moda inspires the woman of style and substance to experiment with a range of colours from sophisticated black to subtle pastels and vibrant shades. So match the shade to your personality! Mix and match from a variety of colours and prints for a feminine look, or a modern twist.Product DetailsRed sleeveless shirt, has a narrow slim collar, full buttoned placket, tie up detail at the hemline and a curved hemlineMaterial and Care80% polyester and 20% cottonMachine wash coldDo not bleach or tumble dryUse cold ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
